prestazioni: Engine: P60B40 (4.0L V8, S65-derived but heavily modified for endurance racing) with a custom dry-sump lubrication system by H&R using a 10-liter capacity tank and dual-scavenge pumps to prevent oil starvation during sustained 9,000 RPM operation. Forced induction via a single Garrett GT4202 turbo (84mm compressor, 76mm turbine) running 2.2 bar of boost, paired with a custom air-to-water intercooler by PWR Racing (core dimensions: 600x300x100mm) and a Bosch Motorsport 800cc/min port-injection system for methanol-water (50/50 mix) to suppress detonation at 12.5:1 static compression.

Drivetrain: Xtrac P1046 6-speed sequential gearbox with a 2.93:1 final drive ratio, mated to a Sachs Racing twin-plate carbon clutch (240mm diameter, 3.5mm friction material) and a 2.5kg lightweight flywheel. Rear differential is a Drexler Motorsport limited-slip unit with 45% preload and a 3.23:1 ratio, featuring a billet aluminum housing and 30-spline output shafts. Half-shafts are custom-made by GKN Driveline with CV joints rated for 1,200 Nm of torque.

Suspension & Chassis: Full Öhlins TTX40 4-way adjustable coilovers with 240mm stroke front and 220mm stroke rear, featuring spherical bearing top mounts and 400lb/in springs (front) / 350lb/in (rear). Chassis reinforcement includes a WRC-spec roll cage by Safety Devices (T45 steel, 2.5mm wall thickness) with integrated strut towers and a carbon fiber front splitter by AC Schnitzer (3-piece design, 40mm adjustable dive planes). Braking system consists of AP Racing CP8650 calipers (6-piston front, 4-piston rear) with 380mm floating rotors (two-piece, aluminum hats) and Ferodo DS3000 pads, paired with a Bosch Motorsport ABS system (8-channel, adjustable via Motec M150 ECU).
estetica: Bodywork: Full carbon fiber widebody kit by RK Motorsport (exclusive to the E46 M3 GTR), featuring a 50mm extended front fenders, 70mm extended rear fenders, and a custom rear diffuser with integrated exhaust exits (dual 90mm titanium tips by Remus). The hood is a one-piece carbon fiber unit with a 150mm central ram-air intake and NACA ducts for intercooler cooling. Side skirts are reinforced with Kevlar for impact resistance and feature integrated air curtains for rear tire aerodynamics.

Aerodynamics: Custom front splitter with a 3-stage Gurney flap (adjustable via remote actuator) and a rear wing by 9 Lives Racing (3D-printed carbon fiber, 1,800mm span, 300mm chord, 25-degree angle of attack). Underbody features a full-length flat floor with vortex generators and a rear diffuser by APR Performance (5-element design, 12-degree angle). Wheel arches are lined with carbon fiber fender flares by Varis (pre-preg autoclave construction, 3mm thickness).

Wheels & Interior: Forged BBS FI-R wheels (19x11 ET15 front, 19x12 ET5 rear) with titanium hardware and Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (295/30/19 front, 335/30/19 rear). Interior features a full carbon fiber monocoque by Status Racing with a 6-point harness (Schroth Profi II) and a MOMO Prototipo steering wheel (350mm diameter, Alcantara-wrapped, quick-release hub). The dashboard is replaced with a Motec C187 digital display (12-inch, 1080p) and a custom carbon fiber center console housing a Bosch Motorsport PDM (Power Distribution Module) and a Motec M150 ECU.
